textPlain: You got to love mathematics. A presentation about the beauty of illustrating mathematics.Presented in a 4:3 themeless beamer.+1
Roger Antonsen's Math is the hidden secret to understanding the world  TED talk on picturing patterns in Mathematics by changing perspectives - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZQElzjCsl9o

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coupling_from_the_pastI "know" this guy from his other insanely clarifying (though dead tree based) expositionsUnderstandable-- & I think personal-ish submits are the best way to HN -- but I wish he'd keep commenting
